title: Big Issues: Permissions for automations, sequences and boards.

posts.author: MatanYa (Matan)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a big issue for us right now.

Every member of the CRM can edit sequences and we cannot do anything about it.

Also every member can see the automations we created which is definitely irrelevant for them.

Also as far as board permissions, we should be able to give different permission set per board based on roles/teams.

But the 2 most important ones are the sequences and automations.

Thank you.
